name: Pasta with Oysters and Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large frying pan and add the oil. Stir in the flour and cook this mixture until it is the color of light peanut butter, being careful not to burn it.
2. Add the chopped onion and saute until limp.
3. Stir in the anchovy paste and half-and-half, stirring carefully to avoid lumps.
4. Turn to a light simmer and add the Tabasco sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and thyme. Simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Add the oysters and shrimp and heat for a few minutes. Do not overcook the seafood.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste and serve over the hot pasta.
7. Garnish with chopped green onions.
